title: payment: mark_notes_spent failure after broadcast leaves permanent double-spend state
description: payment.rs send_payment() line ~253: if mark_notes_spent() fails after a successful broadcast, the error is logged at warn level and the txid is returned as success. The scanner has no nullifier-detection logic (acknowledged in comment at line ~142), so the spent notes remain in unspent_notes() and spendable_notes() indefinitely. On the next send_payment() call, the same notes will be re-selected and the transaction will be broadcast again, receiving a double-spend rejection from the node. The user gets a cryptic BroadcastFailed error with no actionable hint. Recovery requires a full wallet rescan from seed. The comment says '(Long-term fix: add nullifier scanning to scanner.rs)' but no issue was filed. This needs a tracking issue and a user-visible error path that blocks subsequent sends until recovery.
